summary: Added a real-PDF regression test for S20 P51 q6 to lock in the mark-scheme contamination fixes.
test_results: Focused loop verification passed in the final session: 111 focused tests passed and 12 rendering-marker tests passed. The broad non-integration gate currently reports 851 passed, 13 failed, and 36 deselected; failures are unrelated generated-artifact, repo-hygiene, and fixture-debt checks.
acceptance_criteria_status: Satisfied: the real S20 P51 q6 regression excludes notes and q7 text.
Satisfied: the q6 mark-scheme image height/width ratio is below 1.0.
Satisfied: focused rendering, question-detection, and regression gates pass.
repo_hygiene_notes: The real-PDF regression writes only to pytest temporary output and leaves canonical output untouched.
known_risks: The broad non-integration suite still has unrelated failures.
No canonical output regeneration was performed.
implementation_summary: Added REPO_S20_P51_QP and REPO_S20_P51_MS constants pointing at repository source PDFs.
The test runs process_sample with OCR disabled, finds question 6, checks answer text for excluded contamination strings, and asserts the mark-scheme image height/width ratio is below 1.0.
behavior_change: No production behavior changed in this iteration; it added a real-PDF regression guard for the production fixes from earlier iterations.
scope_control: The test writes to pytest temporary output only and does not modify canonical output.
